summary: Russian forces reported kinetic intercepts of Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs by the "Elka" air defense drone in spring 2026. The "Rubikon" Center conducted operations on March 11 and 12, 2026, targeting Ukrainian personnel and UAV control points in Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman, destroying 104 and 111 targets respectively. Ukraine increased multirotor drone procurement by at least 50% year-over-year in January–February 2026. Ukrainian FPV drones struck Russian infantry, including a soldier hiding behind a tree and another charging with a bayonet. Saudi Aramco is negotiating with Ukrainian firms SkyFall and Wild Hornets to acquire interceptor drones for oil field protection.
